list.title: A conversation with Chris Doering on the QBs, receivers, and the new era of Florida football
list.excerpt: Former Florida Gators receiver Chris Doering remains closely tied to everything happening in Gainesville. This week, Gators Online caught up with Doering—who attended multiple spring practices—to get his perspective on the early stages of the Jon Sumrall era at Florida.
